design_name: Foundation T3 — Guardrail + Output Verify + Evidence Mode Framework
scope: T3 design only. F4 Guardrail + F5 Output Verify + F6 Evidence Mode. dev-shadow/additive output-only. NO implementation/LLM/KB/retrieval/memory/Path A/F7-F8/Cosmile/SIASIU/contract/canonical/push.
problem: Foundation does not (a) classify/block input risk(injection/payment/off-domain/internal-probe), (b) verify output(internal leak/efficacy overclaim/avoid/fabrication), (c) cap answer confidence by evidence. → ungrounded assertion/over-confidence risk.
attach_position: F4 pre-judge(advisory flag) → existing decision/guard/T2 unchanged → F6 answer_mode_cap(consumes T2 grounding) → response_plan → F5 verify(answer fields, advisory) → append guardrail_result/evidence_mode/output_verify. ALL output-only advisory(decision/products/answer unchanged this train). LLM-judge = interface/seam, deterministic stub now.

F4_guardrail_contract.policy: default-deny; internal_algorithm_probe→deny; prompt_injection→deny; payment→route_safety; medical/adverse→route_safety(risk-high 정합). dev-shadow deterministic lexicon stub.

checks.internal_code_leak: RISK_*/decisionType/safety enum/영문 risk_tag 잔존(#10 회귀 감시)

F5_output_verify_contract.policy: fail-closed; block→suggested_fallback(advisory); 본 train 검증·flag만(answer 본문 변경 0)

F6_evidence_mode_contract.policy: grounded=False→cannot_determine/uncertain; candidate-only evidence→cautious cap; high-risk(adverse/safety/medical/pregnancy/procedure)→cautious 상한(grounded/assertive 금지); 충분한 지식 근거(F2 실 KB 후)→grounded 가능; dev-shadow product=cautious, else uncertain/cautious

fabrication_policy: grounded=False AND 단정/구체 주장(완치/수치/단정/메모리 인용 근거없음) → fabrication 위반. defer/일반설명 통과. fail-closed(모호→위반). 지어내기 0·근거 초과 0.
candidate_cautious_cap: product 근거가 catalog candidate뿐(지식근거 아님)→F6 answer_mode=cautious 상한(grounded 금지). T2 policy=allow/conditional이어도 cautious 캡. 추천 decision/products 불변(answer_mode 라벨만).
relation_T1_T2: F4=query+risk+refined · F6=T2 grounding+risk+refined+has_candidates · F5=answer+refined+grounding. F6.evidence_required↔T2.grounding_mode=required; F6.candidate_cap↔T2.product_candidate_policy. guard/decision/permission 불변(advisory).
preserve_response_plan_guard: 출력 전용 3필드 추가(guardrail_result/evidence_mode/output_verify). decision_type/products/response_plan/clarification_plan/refined_intent/answer_type/retrieval_decision 무변경. F5 answer 본문 변경 0(enforcement 후속). F6 answer_mode 라벨만.

test_plan.skeleton: F4 guardrail_classify(lexicon stub·default-deny) · F5 verify(결정론·fail-closed) · F6 answer_mode_cap(grounding→mode·candidate cap·high-risk cap)
